'''Uurk''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Police officer/Legends|peace officer]] on the planet [[Emmer]].

He was not a typical Gamorrean. He was perceptive and keen-witted, and extremely honorable. He partnered with [[K4-06B]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Elusive (adventure)|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}} {{1st}}
